string.text: The Calico M950 is a pistol manufactured by Calico Light Weapons Systems in the United States. Its main feature, along with all the other guns of the Calico system, is to feed from a proprietary helical magazine mounted on top, available in a 50 capacity.\n
50 round helical magazine for the Calico M950 and M960. Chambered in 9x19mm.
100 round helical magazine for the Calico M950 and M960. Chambered in 9x19mm. Quiet voluminous.
